site_goal: Connect estate-sale pickers and barn-find dealers with collectors hunting honest, unrestored vintage furniture, with radical price transparency and freight logistics baked in.
audience: collectors of unrestored and patinated furniture
renters and first-apartment shoppers hunting cheap character pieces
description: Barnyard & Bone is a punchier, more flea-market take on the seed: a clustered marketplace built around weekly 'Drops' where dozens of sellers post fresh finds every Thursday at noon. The aesthetic leans into mustard, brick, cream, and ink-black with a chunky display grotesque (Druk-like) slammed against an old-style serif (Caslon-like) for body, plus stenciled lot numbers and price tags rendered as paper labels. Layouts are denser and more chaotic than a typical marketplace: the homepage opens with a countdown to the next Drop and a wall-of-finds masonry grid, browse uses top-bar facet pills plus a column-density slider (3/5/8 across), product pages emphasize honest condition with a 'Patina Report' card and a freight quote module that maps the route. Seller storefronts double as dealer journals; the Journal itself is called 'The Picker's Log' and runs first-person dispatches from estate sales and barn cleanouts.
motif: Paper price-tags, stenciled lot numbers, masonry walls of finds, and weekly Drop countdowns over a mustard-and-brick palette.

pages.layout_pattern: Drop countdown banner over a chaotic masonry wall of fresh finds with sidebar of featured pickers
sections: Mustard banner with next-Drop countdown, participating-seller count, and item preview total
Just-dropped masonry grid (uneven heights, mixed crops) with stenciled lot numbers
Category color-block row (Chairs, Cabinets, Lamps, Rugs, Smalls, Outsider)
Featured pickers sidebar with portrait, region, and 'follow for Drop alerts'
Picker's Log teaser strip with three latest dispatches
How it works three-step explainer (Pickers find / We vet / You bid or buy)
Footer with newsletter, seller application, and freight FAQ

pages.layout_pattern: Top-bar facet pills with density slider over a masonry product grid and inline Drop markers
sections: Top bar: search, facet pills (Era, Style, Condition, Region, Price, Ships/Pickup), Save this search
Density slider toggling 3 / 5 / 8 columns and sort dropdown
Masonry grid of listings with paper price-tag overlays and condition grade chips
Inline Drop markers separating this-week and archive items
Sidebar of related searches and recently sold comps
Load-more with item count remaining

pages.layout_pattern: Gallery-left, details-right with stacked Patina Report, freight-route map, and seller card below
sections: Gallery with dated photo timestamps and a 360-spin toggle if available
Right column: title, lot number, ask price, Buy now, Make offer, Watch
Patina Report expandable card with checkboxes and notes
Dimensions and weight with shipping class
Freight quote module with ZIP/postcode input and route map
Seller card with picker bio, region, and vehicle range for delivery
Sold comps strip showing similar lots and final prices
More from this Drop carousel

pages.layout_pattern: Picker profile header with current-Drop inventory grid and dispatch archive feed
sections: Header with picker portrait, handle, region, vehicle, years picking, follower count
Bio paragraph and quote pull
Current Drop inventory grid with countdown to next release
Archive tabs: Sold, Watched, On-the-truck
Dispatch feed: this picker's Picker's Log entries with photo thumbnails
Reviews with star breakdown and condition-accuracy score

pages.layout_pattern: Sticky-drawer-expanded cart page grouped by picker with per-group freight and pickup toggle
sections: Items grouped under picker headers with thumbnail, title, ask, freight estimate, remove
Per-group toggle: Ship freight / Local pickup / White-glove
Freight consolidation prompt if two pickers share a region
Promo code and gift card fields
Order summary rail with subtotal, freight, taxes, total, Checkout
Watchlist row showing items dropping price soon
Trust strip: condition guarantee, 72-hour inspection window

pages.layout_pattern: Tabbed dashboard with Drop calendar, watchlist board, orders timeline, and followed pickers
sections: Greeting header with member tier and total saved
Drop calendar showing upcoming releases with reminder toggles
Watchlist board grouped by 'Drops soon', 'Price reduced', 'About to expire'
Orders timeline with freight status, route map, and inspection-window countdown
Followed pickers grid with new-Drop badges
Addresses, payment, and notification preferences panels

pages.layout_pattern: Photo-essay feed titled 'The Picker's Log' with location-tagged dispatches and shoppable hotspots
sections: Featured dispatch with oversized headline, dateline, and full-bleed photo essay
Region filter chips (Midwest, Northeast, South, Mountain, Coast)
Dispatch grid with picker byline, location, items recovered count
Shoppable photo hotspots linking from essay images to live listings
Submit-a-tip form for readers to point pickers at upcoming estate sales

message_intent: Make the marketplace feel like a live, time-bound event rather than a static catalog
Celebrate honest wear and unrestored character over polish
Demystify freight cost and timing so buyers can commit confidently
Give pickers and dealers a stage for their hunt narratives
content_model: Listing: lot number, title, ask price, freight estimate, condition grade with Patina Report (wear, repairs, smells, structural), dimensions, dated photos, seller, pickup region
Drop: scheduled release time, participating sellers, item count, preview thumbnails, countdown
Seller: handle, region, picker bio, vehicle (for delivery range), drop participation, archive
Picker's Log entry: dispatch title, location, date picked, photo essay, items recovered with inline shop links
Saved list and watchlist with Drop-day notifications
Order with freight routing map and ETA
interactions: Drop countdown timer that flips to a live-listing grid at release
Column-density slider toggling 3, 5, or 8 items across
Top-bar facet pills with multi-select and 'Save this search'
Patina Report expandable card with checkboxes for wear, repairs, structural notes, and odor
Freight quote module that geocodes ZIP/postcode and draws a route on a small map
Sticky cart drawer with per-seller pickup-vs-ship toggle
Watchlist alarm icon on each card that sets a Drop-day reminder
Picker's Log photo essays with shoppable image hotspots
asset_needs: On-location photography from estate sales, barns, and warehouses
Studio-lit furniture shots with visible wear, scratches, and original finishes
Paper price-tag and stenciled-number graphic elements
Small route-map illustrations for freight visualization
Picker portraits leaning against trucks or in workshops
mobile_behavior: Drop countdown pins to the top; facet pills become a horizontal scroller; density slider hides in favor of a fixed two-column masonry; cart drawer becomes a swipe-up sheet with a sticky 'View cart' tab.
